name: Vasca Kavat
description: Now free of the Vasca virus, these Kavats can transfuse life to extend not only their own health but that of their master.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Made slight tweaks to the Conservation Lure call and Vasca Kavat escape sound FX.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed broken textures on the Vasca Kavat fur.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing breed type for Vasca Kavat Imprints.

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Update 29.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved the Vasca Kavat Starter Kit Market icon to better display what it contains.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed killing a Vasca Kavat on the Plains of Eidolon not counting for the Pest Control Achievement.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fur Patterns incorrectly applying to Vasca Kavats.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when a Vasca Kavat uses Draining Bite.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that would occur when exiting an Open World mission while your Vasca Kavat was approaching a target for Draining Bite.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vasca Kavat babies having broken textures when previewing in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vasca Kavat Lure meter not moving smoothly.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vasca Kavat Floof description reading Orb Vallis instead of Plains of Eidolon.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some players not being able to purchase the Vasca Kavat Starter Kit.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed ability to equip certain Fur Patterns on Vasca Kavat hybrids (Infected Kavat bred with a normal Kavat) that result in broken textures. This follows suit with the pure Vasca Kavat. 
Fixed the Vasca Kavat Starter Kit not displaying how many Vasca Imprints you already own.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed towards the Vasca Kavat’s neck textures being separate from its body.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes:
Bring your Kavat to the Plains of Eidolon at night to meet a Vasca Kavat 
Don’t feel like getting in a cat fight? Check out the Market for the Vasca Kavat Starter Kit!
